gui.horizoncore.tech_tree.title: Horizon Technology Tree
gui.horizoncore.skill_book.title: Player Skills & Expertise
tech.horizoncore.flint_knapping.desc: Learn to strike stones together to create sharp edges. Unlocks basic flint tools.
tech.horizoncore.fire_making.desc: Harness the spark. Unlocks the ability to craft and place Campfires for warmth and cooking.
